description_long: This is a visually appealing cupcake with a fluted, pastel blue wrapper that encases a light yellow cake base. The top is generously swirled with white, glossy icing, forming a tall, spiral peak. Scattered across the icing are small, round, pastel purple sprinkles, adding a playful and decorative touch. The wrapper has a distinct, ridged texture, while the icing appears smooth and creamy. The overall design is whimsical and inviting, reminiscent of a classic bakery treat. The cupcake is compact and would fit comfortably in the palm of a hand, making it suitable for display in urban food stalls or cafes.
description: A pastel blue cupcake with white swirled icing and purple sprinkles, set in a fluted wrapper. The design is playful and visually inviting.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full swirl of white icing, purple sprinkles, and the fluted blue wrapper.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated, highlighting the spiral icing and more of the left side of the blue wrapper.
description_view_2: Centered view emphasizing the symmetry of the icing swirl and even distribution of sprinkles.
description_view_3: View from the opposite side, showing the right side of the wrapper and a different arrangement of sprinkles.
